flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Kean University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.6k → $14.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Kean University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($19.8k → $22.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Kean University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (43.4% vs 48.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Kean University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).
